name: Signature: List

description.en: View all signature requests you have created.
description.de: Alle von dir erstellten Signaturanfragen ansehen.

bot: Lists all signature requests created by the connected wallet. Shows pending, completed, cancelled, and expired requests.

success.ro: Cererile de semnatura au fost incarcate.
